flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Farmingdale State College rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Farmingdale State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Farmingdale State College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (31.4% → 41.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Farmingdale State College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (23.0% → 26.5%).
